---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<span class="eyebrow">Last updated February 2026</span>

You can [download my CV as a PDF](assets/Berns_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-sm}, or browse it below.

<iframe class="cv-frame" src="assets/Berns_CV.pdf" title="Curriculum Vitae of Joris Berns"></iframe>

*If the embedded viewer does not load on your device, use the download link above.*
